---
title: "Data & Methods"
---

:::{.text-box3}

Preview our Data Layer Guidance table below, which provides an overview of the data layers used in the Safer Parks Dashboard, including their source, description, and how they can be used to inform park safety and design decisions.

You can also view [the data table in full-screen pdf format](assets/The%20Safer%20Parks_Data%20Layer%20Guidance_Table_v1.pdf) (and download/print), or download the [Microsoft Word document](assets/The%20Safer%20Parks_Data%20Layer%20Guidance_Table_v1.docx).

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Learn more about using the different data layers to improve safety and inclusion in parks and green spaces across England and Wales in our [How to Use guide](guide.qmd).
:::

::::{.column-page}

::: {.pdf-preview}

<iframe src="assets/The%20Safer%20Parks_Data%20Layer%20Guidance_Table_v1.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>

:::

::::
